data.body: 5899 (unclear-verymad-sablefish, remaining user-facing deprecations) committed+pushed (7e29166a). Removed list_epics family (CLI subcommand + MCP tool + schema, types.py regenerated), REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS, --no-sync, reconciler.lock_backend key, rebar_id_guard_mode dead reader. Registry now = 6 permanent renames only. Full tests/unit+interfaces 4301 passed. Next+last: audacious-bairnish-ugandakob (internal-only shims). Then endgame.
